fa-raygun.appearanceId: a retro sci-fi ray gun silhouette with a pistol grip handle, a barrel pointing forward, and a bulbous emitter nozzle; futuristic blaster outline with trigger grip and flared muzzle
fa-raygun.functionalityId: represents a science fiction laser weapon or retro futuristic shooting device; indicates a sci-fi game action or space-themed attack element
fa-raygun.intentId: select a sci-fi weapon or laser blaster in a game or space-themed interface; indicate a retro futuristic shooting action

fa-receipt.appearanceId: a rectangular paper slip with horizontal lines representing printed text and a serrated or wavy torn bottom edge; receipt paper outline with ruled lines and jagged bottom
fa-receipt.functionalityId: displays a purchase receipt or transaction record; accesses billing history or order confirmation details
fa-receipt.intentId: view or manage a purchase receipt or transaction summary; access billing records in a shopping or finance application

fa-record-vinyl.appearanceId: a circular vinyl record disc silhouette with a small center hole and concentric ring grooves on the surface; round phonograph record outline with a center label circle and groove rings
fa-record-vinyl.functionalityId: represents a vinyl record or analog audio playback medium; indicates a music track, album, or retro audio collection
fa-record-vinyl.intentId: browse or play vinyl record music; indicate a retro audio or record collection in a music application

fa-rectangle.appearanceId: a plain filled or outlined horizontal rectangle shape with no additional badges or markings; flat landscape-oriented rectangular box
fa-rectangle.functionalityId: represents a basic rectangular shape element in a design or drawing tool; indicates a layout block or placeholder region
fa-rectangle.intentId: insert or select a rectangle shape in a design or drawing application; represent a basic layout block or content region

fa-rectangle-code.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle outline containing a pair of angle-bracket less-than and greater-than symbols resembling code brackets inside; rectangular box with code angle-bracket glyphs
fa-rectangle-code.functionalityId: represents a code block or programming snippet within a rectangular container; inserts or views source code in a formatted text region
fa-rectangle-code.intentId: insert or display a code block in a document or editor; access a formatted source code region in a development interface

fa-rectangle-hd.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle outline containing the letters HD in uppercase centered inside; wide rectangular badge with HD text label
fa-rectangle-hd.functionalityId: indicates high-definition video resolution for a media element; toggles or displays HD quality video content
fa-rectangle-hd.intentId: select or display high-definition video quality; indicate HD resolution in a media player or video settings interface

fa-rectangle-history.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle with two or three smaller stacked rectangles overlapping behind it, suggesting a layered history stack; landscape rectangle with layered shadow copies behind it
fa-rectangle-history.functionalityId: represents a browsing or document history stack; accesses previously viewed pages or items in a history panel
fa-rectangle-history.intentId: view or navigate browser or document history; access a history or recently visited items panel

fa-rectangle-history-circle-plus.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle with stacked history layers behind it and a small circle containing a plus sign as a badge overlaid at a corner; history-stack rectangle with a circular add badge
fa-rectangle-history-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds a new entry to a history or recently viewed list; creates a new history record or bookmarks an item to a history stack
fa-rectangle-history-circle-plus.intentId: add a new item to a browsing or document history list; bookmark or save a page into a history collection

fa-rectangle-history-circle-user.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle with stacked history layers behind it and a small circle containing a user silhouette badge overlaid at a corner; history-stack rectangle with a circular user profile badge
fa-rectangle-history-circle-user.functionalityId: associates a user profile with a history entry or browsing session; displays user-specific browsing or document history
fa-rectangle-history-circle-user.intentId: view a user's personal browsing or document history; associate a history record with a specific user account

fa-rectangle-portrait.appearanceId: a vertical portrait-oriented rectangle taller than it is wide with no additional markings; tall upright rectangular box in portrait aspect ratio
fa-rectangle-portrait.functionalityId: represents a portrait-orientation layout or card element; switches a view or canvas to vertical portrait mode
fa-rectangle-portrait.intentId: set or indicate a portrait orientation for a document, card, or canvas; select a vertical layout in a design interface

fa-rectangle-sd.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle outline containing the letters SD in uppercase centered inside; wide rectangular badge with SD text label
fa-rectangle-sd.functionalityId: indicates standard-definition video resolution for a media element; toggles or displays SD quality video content
fa-rectangle-sd.intentId: select or display standard-definition video quality; indicate SD resolution in a media player or video settings interface

fa-rectangle-terminal.appearanceId: a horizontal rectangle outline containing a terminal prompt symbol such as a greater-than sign or underscore cursor; rectangular box with a command-line prompt glyph inside
fa-rectangle-terminal.functionalityId: represents a terminal window or command-line interface panel; opens or indicates a shell or CLI session
fa-rectangle-terminal.intentId: open or access a terminal or command-line interface; indicate a shell session or developer console window

fa-rectangle-vertical-history.appearanceId: a vertical portrait rectangle with two or three smaller stacked portrait rectangles overlapping behind it, suggesting a vertical history stack; tall portrait rectangle with layered shadow copies behind it
fa-rectangle-vertical-history.functionalityId: represents a vertical stack of history items or pages; navigates a vertical history panel of previously viewed portrait-oriented items
fa-rectangle-vertical-history.intentId: view or navigate a vertical history stack of pages or items; access a vertically stacked history panel in an application

fa-rectangle-wide.appearanceId: a wide low-aspect-ratio horizontal rectangle with a notably wider width-to-height ratio than a standard rectangle; extra-wide landscape rectangular bar shape
fa-rectangle-wide.functionalityId: represents a wide banner or header layout block; indicates a full-width or wide-format content region
fa-rectangle-wide.intentId: insert or select a wide banner or full-width layout element; indicate a wide-format content region in a design tool

fa-rectangles-mixed.appearanceId: a group of multiple rectangles of different sizes and orientations arranged together, mixing portrait and landscape shapes; assorted rectangle collection with varying aspect ratios grouped together
fa-rectangles-mixed.functionalityId: represents a mixed or varied layout of multiple rectangle elements; indicates a mosaic or multi-size tile arrangement in a grid
fa-rectangles-mixed.intentId: arrange or display a mixed layout of varied rectangle tiles; indicate a multi-size grid or mosaic layout in a design interface

fa-recycle.appearanceId: three curved arrows arranged in a triangular chase pattern forming the universal recycling symbol; three-arrow chasing triangular recycling loop
fa-recycle.functionalityId: represents recycling or environmental sustainability; indicates a recyclable material category or a recycle action
fa-recycle.intentId: indicate recyclable content or an environmental sustainability action; mark an item for recycling in a waste management interface

fa-redo.appearanceId: a single circular arrow curving clockwise forming a forward loop with an arrowhead at the end; clockwise circular redo arrow loop
fa-redo.functionalityId: reapplies the last undone action in an editor or application; moves forward in the action history
fa-redo.intentId: redo a previously undone action in an editor or form; move forward through the history of changes in an application

fa-redo-alt.appearanceId: a curved right-turning arrow with a long shaft looping back to the right and an arrowhead pointing rightward; alternative curved forward-direction redo arrow
fa-redo-alt.functionalityId: reapplies the last undone action using an alternative arrow style; represents a forward or redo navigation action
fa-redo-alt.intentId: redo a previously undone action using an alternative control style; move forward in edit history in an application

fa-reel.appearanceId: a circular film reel silhouette with a central hub, spoke dividers, and sprocket or notch cutouts around the outer ring; round film reel outline with hub spokes and edge notches
fa-reel.functionalityId: represents a film reel or video footage element; accesses or plays film content from a media library
fa-reel.intentId: browse or access a film reel or video content in a media application; indicate a cinema or film production asset

fa-reflect-both.appearanceId: a shape duplicated and mirrored across both a horizontal and vertical axis simultaneously, creating four symmetric copies around a center point; object reflected across both axes with four-way symmetry
fa-reflect-both.functionalityId: applies both horizontal and vertical reflection to a design element simultaneously; creates a four-way mirrored symmetry on a shape
fa-reflect-both.intentId: mirror a design element across both axes at once; apply four-way symmetric reflection in a design or drawing tool

fa-reflect-horizontal.appearanceId: a shape and its mirror image placed side by side with a vertical center axis line between them; object reflected across a vertical axis with a left-right mirror pair
fa-reflect-horizontal.functionalityId: applies a horizontal flip or left-right mirror to a design element; reflects a shape across a vertical axis
fa-reflect-horizontal.intentId: flip a design element horizontally or create a left-right mirror copy; apply horizontal reflection in a design or drawing tool

fa-reflect-vertical.appearanceId: a shape and its mirror image stacked above and below with a horizontal center axis line between them; object reflected across a horizontal axis with a top-bottom mirror pair
fa-reflect-vertical.functionalityId: applies a vertical flip or top-bottom mirror to a design element; reflects a shape across a horizontal axis
fa-reflect-vertical.intentId: flip a design element vertically or create a top-bottom mirror copy; apply vertical reflection in a design or drawing tool

fa-refrigerator.appearanceId: a tall upright kitchen appliance silhouette with a rectangular body, a top compartment door and a lower compartment door with handles on both; refrigerator outline with upper and lower door panels and handles
fa-refrigerator.functionalityId: represents a kitchen refrigerator appliance; indicates a cold storage, food preservation, or smart appliance feature
fa-refrigerator.intentId: manage or indicate a refrigerator appliance in a smart home or kitchen application; represent food storage or cold chain management

fa-registered.appearanceId: a capital letter R with a small superscript circle enclosing it forming the registered trademark symbol; circled R registered trademark glyph
fa-registered.functionalityId: indicates a registered trademark status for a brand or product name; displays the registered trademark symbol in a legal or branding context
fa-registered.intentId: mark a brand name or logo as a registered trademark; display the registered trademark symbol in a legal or product labeling context

fa-repeat.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows forming a rectangular loop, one pointing right on top and one pointing left on the bottom, creating a continuous cycle; rectangular two-arrow looping repeat symbol
fa-repeat.functionalityId: enables looping or repeating playback of a media track or playlist; cycles through content continuously
fa-repeat.intentId: loop or repeat audio or video playback in a media player; enable continuous repeat of a playlist or track

fa-repeat-1.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows forming a rectangular loop with a small numeral 1 centered inside the loop area; rectangular two-arrow loop with a number one badge inside
fa-repeat-1.functionalityId: enables single-track or single-item repeat playback; loops the currently playing item exactly once
fa-repeat-1.intentId: repeat only the current track or item once in a media player; enable single-loop playback mode

fa-repeat-1-alt.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows forming a rectangular loop with a small numeral 1 inside and an alternative arrow direction or style compared to the standard repeat-1; alternative-direction rectangular loop with a number one badge
fa-repeat-1-alt.functionalityId: enables an alternative single-item repeat mode with a different loop direction; represents a reverse or alternate single-track repeat
fa-repeat-1-alt.intentId: use an alternative single-repeat mode in a media player; loop the current item with an alternate repeat orientation

fa-repeat-alt.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows forming a rectangular loop but with the arrow directions reversed compared to the standard repeat, pointing in alternate directions; alternative-direction rectangular two-arrow loop
fa-repeat-alt.functionalityId: enables an alternate looping or repeat direction for media playback; cycles through content in the reverse loop orientation
fa-repeat-alt.intentId: activate an alternate repeat or loop direction in a media player; cycle content using a reverse or alternative loop mode

fa-reply.appearanceId: a single curved arrow that points to the left, with its tail coming from the right and curving downward-left, like a reply arrow on an envelope; single leftward-curving reply arrow
fa-reply.functionalityId: replies to a message, email, or comment; sends a response to the original sender
fa-reply.intentId: reply to an email, message, or comment; send a response back to the original author

fa-reply-all.appearanceId: two overlapping leftward-curving arrows side by side, with the left arrow slightly offset behind the right, forming a double reply arrow shape; double leftward-curving reply-all arrows
fa-reply-all.functionalityId: replies to all recipients of a message or email thread; sends a response to every participant in a conversation
fa-reply-all.intentId: reply to all recipients of an email or group message; send a response to everyone in a conversation thread

fa-reply-time.appearanceId: a leftward-curving reply arrow combined with a small clock face badge showing clock hands; reply arrow with a clock time badge overlay
fa-reply-time.functionalityId: indicates a scheduled reply or a timed response to a message; displays the reply time or sets a delayed send for a response
fa-reply-time.intentId: schedule a timed reply to a message or email; indicate the response time or set a delayed send in a communication interface

fa-republican.appearanceId: an elephant silhouette representing the Republican Party mascot, typically shown with a raised trunk and stylized body; Republican elephant outline with trunk and body shape
fa-republican.functionalityId: represents the Republican political party in the United States; indicates a Republican candidate, policy, or election-related item
fa-republican.intentId: indicate a Republican political affiliation or candidate; label election content or political data with the Republican party symbol

fa-restroom.appearanceId: a male stick figure and a female stick figure with a skirt side by side, indicating a shared restroom; paired male and female person silhouettes for a gender-inclusive restroom sign
fa-restroom.functionalityId: indicates the location of a shared or gender-inclusive restroom facility; labels restroom or bathroom access in a venue map
fa-restroom.intentId: find or label a shared restroom or bathroom facility; indicate restroom access on a venue map or directory

fa-restroom-simple.appearanceId: a simplified pair of a male and female stick-figure silhouette side by side in a minimal line style; minimal paired gender-figure restroom symbol
fa-restroom-simple.functionalityId: indicates the location of a restroom using a simplified or minimal icon style; labels bathroom access in a clean or simplified UI
fa-restroom-simple.intentId: find or label a restroom facility using a simplified visual indicator; indicate bathroom access in a minimal or clean design

fa-retweet.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows forming a rectangular loop similar to a repeat symbol, styled for social media sharing; rectangular two-arrow retweet loop for social sharing
fa-retweet.functionalityId: retweets or reshares a social media post; forwards content to a user's followers on a social platform
fa-retweet.intentId: retweet or reshare a post on a social media platform; forward content to followers in a social network interface

fa-retweet-alt.appearanceId: two curved arrows forming a circular chase loop for social sharing, with an alternative circular path instead of a rectangular loop; circular two-arrow alternative retweet loop
fa-retweet-alt.functionalityId: retweens or reshares content using an alternative circular loop style; represents a social reshare action with a circular arrow design
fa-retweet-alt.intentId: reshare or retweet content using an alternative style action; forward a social post to followers with a circular share loop

fa-rhombus.appearanceId: a four-sided diamond or rhombus shape with equal sides and pointed top, bottom, left, and right vertices; geometric diamond rhombus outline with four equal sides
fa-rhombus.functionalityId: represents a rhombus or diamond geometric shape element in a drawing tool; inserts or selects a diamond shape in a design layout
fa-rhombus.intentId: insert or select a rhombus or diamond shape in a design or drawing application; represent a diamond geometric element in a layout

fa-ribbon.appearanceId: a decorative ribbon loop silhouette with two folded loop ends and two trailing tail ends forming an awareness or gift bow shape; looped awareness ribbon bow outline with two tails
fa-ribbon.functionalityId: represents a cause awareness ribbon or a decorative gift bow; indicates a charitable campaign, award, or decorative embellishment
fa-ribbon.intentId: indicate a cause awareness campaign or charitable initiative; represent a decorative ribbon or award in a social or health application

fa-right.appearanceId: a solid rightward-pointing arrow with a triangular arrowhead and a short horizontal shaft; plain right-direction arrow with a filled arrowhead
fa-right.functionalityId: navigates or moves to the right; indicates a forward or next action in a directional control
fa-right.intentId: move or navigate to the right in an interface; indicate a forward or next step in a sequence or carousel

fa-right-from-line.appearanceId: a rightward-pointing arrow with its tail beginning at a vertical line on the left side; right arrow departing from a left-side boundary line
fa-right-from-line.functionalityId: exits or moves content to the right from a boundary or starting line; represents an outward or departure action from a fixed edge
fa-right-from-line.intentId: exit a panel or region to the right from a boundary line; indicate a departure or expand-right action from a fixed edge

fa-right-left.appearanceId: two horizontal arrows pointing in opposite directions, one pointing right and one pointing left, stacked or side by side; bidirectional right-left double arrow pair
fa-right-left.functionalityId: swaps, exchanges, or toggles between two items or directions; represents a bidirectional transfer or sort action
fa-right-left.intentId: swap or exchange two items or values in an interface; indicate a bidirectional transfer or toggle between two states

fa-right-left-large.appearanceId: two large horizontal arrows pointing in opposite directions, one pointing right and one pointing left, with a notably larger and bolder arrow style; large bold bidirectional right-left arrow pair
fa-right-left-large.functionalityId: swaps or exchanges items with a more prominent visual weight; represents a large-scale bidirectional transfer or prominent toggle action
fa-right-left-large.intentId: perform a prominent swap or bidirectional exchange action; indicate a large-scale toggle or transfer between two directions

fa-right-long.appearanceId: a long horizontal arrow pointing right with an elongated shaft and a triangular arrowhead at the right end; extended-length rightward arrow with a long horizontal shaft
fa-right-long.functionalityId: indicates a long forward movement or navigation to the right; represents a significant or extended directional shift
fa-right-long.intentId: navigate significantly to the right or indicate a long forward progression; represent an extended directional move in a layout or flow

fa-right-long-to-line.appearanceId: a long rightward-pointing arrow with an elongated shaft whose arrowhead terminates at a vertical line on the right side; long right arrow ending at a right-side boundary line
fa-right-long-to-line.functionalityId: moves content rightward until it reaches a defined boundary or stop line; represents a snap-to-edge or align-to-right action
fa-right-long-to-line.intentId: snap or move content to the right edge or boundary; align an element to a right-side boundary line in a layout tool

fa-right-to-line.appearanceId: a short rightward-pointing arrow with its arrowhead touching or meeting a vertical line on the right side; right arrow pointing toward and reaching a right-side boundary line
fa-right-to-line.functionalityId: moves or collapses content to the right boundary line; docks or snaps an element to the right edge
fa-right-to-line.intentId: dock or snap a panel or element to the right boundary; collapse or move content to the right edge of a container

fa-ring.appearanceId: a circular band or ring silhouette with a uniform-width loop and no stone or setting, resembling a plain wedding or finger ring; plain circular band ring outline
fa-ring.functionalityId: represents a ring accessory or jewelry item; indicates a wedding, engagement, or jewelry-related feature
fa-ring.intentId: select or display a ring in a jewelry or wedding planning application; indicate a ring accessory in a fashion or e-commerce interface

fa-ring-diamond.appearanceId: a circular band ring silhouette with a raised diamond-shaped gemstone setting at the top of the band; ring outline with a diamond gem stone on the band
fa-ring-diamond.functionalityId: represents a diamond engagement ring or a luxury jewelry item; indicates a jewelry selection or engagement-related feature
fa-ring-diamond.intentId: select or display a diamond engagement ring in a jewelry or wedding application; indicate a luxury ring in an e-commerce or gift interface

fa-rings-wedding.appearanceId: two interlocking circular band rings side by side with their loops overlapping or linked together; two interlinked wedding band rings overlapping
fa-rings-wedding.functionalityId: represents a wedding ceremony or marriage event; indicates a wedding planning, anniversary, or marriage-related feature
fa-rings-wedding.intentId: indicate a wedding ceremony or marriage event in a planning or event application; represent a wedding or anniversary in a calendar or celebration interface
